ops.title: plan-trip.js Load brief drifted from trip status v2 output
ops.description: skills/getaway/plan-trip.js's Load agent brief (lines ~218-236) tells the agent that `trip status` emits sweep_labels, hybrid, round_trip, active_factors, and max_finalists — none exist. Live v2 status emits {slug, trip_type, lodging, requires, party, phase_map, quota} (verified 2026-07-13 on the journeys working copy; committed trips.py status() matches). Consequences of dispatching as-is: `hybrid` maps from a missing key so hybrid phases silently skip; maxFinalists/activeFactors get invented by the agent to satisfy CONTEXT_SCHEMA. Root cause trail: the getaway-v2-fixes workflow's fix:plan-trip lane (papercut 2026-07-13T13:14) returned a preamble fragment and changed zero files, so plan-trip.js never got its v2 alignment. Sweep labels ARE derivable from phase_map keys (sweep:outbound:<bucket>); trip_type maps to roundTrip; hybrid/activeFactors/maxFinalists need real sources (trip show plan.hybrid, trip profile actives, PRESENTATION_LIMIT?). Align after the journeys refactor lands, since artifact schemas (expand.json journeys shape) changed too.

ops.text: plan-trip.js Load brief's documented keys match live `trip status` output, and hybrid/roundTrip/maxFinalists/activeFactors each map from a key that actually exists
a plan-trip.js Workflow dispatch on a hybrid round-trip ask reaches Finalize with hybrid phases NOT skipped
